Your spaces

Show only the spaces your family actually uses. Hidden spaces keep all their data and can return anytime.

Install app

Add Wisal to your home screen for a full-screen, app-like experience that opens in one tap — no browser bars, no address to remember.

Installed. You can open Wisal from your home screen like any other app.

Privacy & Terms

Privacy Policy

Your family’s life belongs to your family. Wisal keeps your data on this device first. When you sign in, an encrypted copy syncs to your own private cloud space (Supabase) so your household stays together across phones.

Row-Level Security means each account can only ever read the household it owns or was invited into with a code. Wisal has no ads, no trackers and no analytics, and never sells or shares your data.

The AI assistant. When you send it a message, that message and a summary of your family data go to Google’s Gemini service so it can answer. This happens only when you write to it. Your Secure Vault, the PIN-protected space, your passwords and your chat messages are never sent.

Voice notes, photos and files shared in Chats travel through the same protected space. Backups you export are files in your own hands — keep them safe.

Your PIN is yours alone. We cannot see inside the Vault, cannot recover it and cannot reset your PIN. If you forget it, that content is gone.

Erase everything whenever you like: Settings → Reset clears this device; Account → Delete account & data erases your cloud copy too.

Terms of Use

Wisal is a home for one family’s honest life — not for unlawful content or for harming others. The invite code is a key: share it only with people who belong in your home.

Owners and admins can invite and manage members; every member is responsible for what they add. Children’s profiles are managed by their guardians. Wisal is built for adults running a household.

Wisal is provided with love and care, as-is — please keep backups of what matters most. Continued use means you agree to these terms.

Questions? Reach the maker of Wisal at hamzamuhammad.trd@gmail.com.

Full Privacy PolicyWhat we store, who it goes to, how to erase it

Reset

Permanently delete everything on this device — members, health, finances, documents and settings. Export a backup first if you’d like to keep it. If cloud sync is on, your cloud copy stays safe, signing back in restores it. This can’t be undone.
